# Doctor Avatars

Drop your real doctor avatar images into this folder and keep the same filenames below to replace placeholders immediately:

- doctor-nguyen-van-minh.svg
- doctor-le-minh-tam.svg
- doctor-nguyen-thuy-chi.svg
- doctor-pham-minh-ngoc.svg
- doctor-tran-thi-phuong-lan.svg
- doctor-tran-quoc-anh.svg
- doctor-lam-duc-huy.svg
- doctor-vu-thanh-mai.svg

Notes:
- You can use `.jpg`, `.jpeg`, `.png`, or `.webp` too.
- If you change extension or filename, update `src/data/mockData.js` avatar paths accordingly.
